repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing contributor PR #80929 on its contributor branch, preserving the two-file deterministic outbound delivery-error classification scope. The intended patch is to keep the permanent-error classifier additions for disallowed local media paths and Telegram overlong-message failures, plus focused policy-test coverage, without changing broader delivery semantics or opening a replacement PR.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Summary
- Repair existing contributor PR #80929 without expanding its scope.
- Preserve the two-file outbound delivery permanent-error classifier and policy-test changes for local media allowlist failures and Telegram overlong-message failures.
- Keep #75131 open for the broader delivery queue idempotency and message-splitting work.

Verification
- pnpm test src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.policy.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose
- pnpm check:changed

Credit
- Source PR and attribution: #80929 by @honor2030.
- Related issue context: #66489 and #75131.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @honor2030 as the author of source PR #80929.
Keep #66489 reporter context attached through the existing Closes #66489 linkage in #80929.
Do not open a replacement PR in this job; repair the contributor branch by normal push only or stop.
